content: Steam Proton layout: game binaries/Data live in steamapps/common/<Game> (outside prefix, immutable-ish). Wine prefix per-game at steamapps/compatdata/<appid>/pfx with drive_c emulating Windows; user dirs at pfx/drive_c/users/steamuser/. Bethesda plugins.txt/loadorder + INIs live under the prefix at users/steamuser/AppData/Local/<Game>/. Multiple Steam libraries possible (each has its own steamapps); must scan libraryfolders.vdf. appmanifest_<appid>.acf gives installdir. So mod manager resolves: install dir (common) for Data files, prefix AppData for plugins.txt/load order.
